{{Infobox group
| name = Council
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council of Architects]] serves as the governing body for the [[Consultant's Guild]]. Comprised of a diverse group of specialists including administrators, strategists, alchemists, and [[Readers]], the Council is made up of individuals with exceptionally valuable talents. While most [[Architects]] deliberate in anonymous alcoves, the group is led by three [[High Councilors]] who sit openly around a white, chalk-like column. This ancient artifact serves as a table and can be used to display glowing yellow markings; it was originally crafted by early [[Empire]] alchemists and [[Readers]] for strategic planning. The Council's headquarters is located in an underground chamber on [[Gray Island]], featuring a ceiling of soil and tree roots illuminated by hanging lamps. Although the Council holds significant authority, including the power to decide which individuals are targeted for removal by [[Gardeners]], it lacks a single unifying leader. This absence of a singular figurehead distinguishes the Council from other [[Guild Heads]] and can lead to challenges in providing a unified vision for the [[Consultants]]. The [[High Councilors]] represent the [[Am’haranai]] and act as the voice of the [[Guild]] in negotiations with other organizations.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Council]] is a group that knows about the client requesting the [[Gardeners-in-training]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Council]] blessed the removal of documents from the [[Miners]]' archives.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Council]] is an entity [[Hansin]] might go to for help.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Council]] decides which weeds should be pruned.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is a symbol that unites the [[Guild]] in a way the [[Council]] never could.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Council]] is an ever-shifting body that governs the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|No one trusts the [[Council]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
